_meta.description: D6 fixtures for llamaindex / byoc (bring-your-own-component / declarative hashbrown)

fixtures._comment: byoc hashbrown pill — emits render_a2ui tool call with metric card + pie chart + bar chart JSON payload. The D5 assertion checks for [data-testid='metric-card'] and either [data-testid='bar-chart'] or [data-testid='pie-chart']. hasToolResult:false ensures this fires on the initial prompt, not on the tool result follow-up.
byoc hashbrown pill — follow-up after render_a2ui returns.

response.content: Q4 sales dashboard rendered above — total revenue hit $2.4M with strong growth across all segments.
